title: Write LICHEN designer commissioning note
description: Create and revise a direct visual-identity commission for Jett Atwood translating the approved LICHEN brand concept into production artwork for a $2,000 USD creative fee. Define the assignment, fixed direction, deliverables, application tests, collaborative revision process, scope exclusions, and CC-BY-ND-4.0 licensing for final accepted work.
acceptance_criteria: The note can be sent directly to Jett Atwood with docs/brand-concept.md; it states the $2,000 USD creative fee, requests three one-color concepts and production deliverables, provides for reasonable collaborative revisions without a rigid round count, contains no bidding language, and specifies CC-BY-ND-4.0 for final accepted identity artwork and guidelines.
close_reason: Specified CC-BY-ND-4.0 for final accepted identity artwork and guidelines, distinguished drafts and rejected concepts, and retained separate copyright ownership, attribution, source-file, trademark, and third-party-material terms; verification passed.
